tasks.label: Start Backend
tasks.command: source venv/bin/activate && [ -f .env ] && set -a && source .env && set +a; if [ -z "$SECRET_KEY" ] || echo "$SECRET_KEY" | grep -Eiq 'change-me|super-secret-key-change-in-production|test-secret-key'; then export SECRET_KEY=$(openssl rand -hex 32); echo 'Using generated temporary SECRET_KEY for this session.'; fi; uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

tasks.label: Start Scheduler
tasks.command: source venv/bin/activate && [ -f .env ] && set -a && source .env && set +a; if [ -z "$SECRET_KEY" ] || echo "$SECRET_KEY" | grep -Eiq 'change-me|super-secret-key-change-in-production|test-secret-key'; then export SECRET_KEY=$(openssl rand -hex 32); echo 'Using generated temporary SECRET_KEY for this session.'; fi; python scheduler.py
